# CleanAlta Thailand

> CleanAlta Thailand is a multilingual static website for drone cleaning, drone inspection and drone 3D modeling in Thailand.

## Priority pages
- /en/
- /en/services/
- /en/services/drone-cleaning/
- /en/services/drone-inspection/
- /en/services/drone-3d-modeling/
- /en/compliance/
- /en/invest/
- /en/contact/

## Site summary
CleanAlta Thailand positions drone operations as a premium corporate service line.
The website is built around three strategic offers:
1. Drone cleaning
2. Drone inspection
3. Drone 3D modeling

The site uses real field photography, multilingual routing, local SEO pages, buyer-facing project pages and a static contact brief generator.

## Audience
- Asset owners
- Hotel groups
- Property managers
- Industrial operators
- Infrastructure teams
- Strategic partners
- Investors

## Notes
- The website is static and GitHub-ready.
- The contact page includes email and WhatsApp brief generation without an external backend.
